author: Joel Weintraub
text: What a great experience. I was researching granite and quartz countertops and was getting frustrated with the price and poor customer service in my area. I then stumbled upon Alliance Granite and Quartz and was pleasantly surprised. The receptionist answering the phone was very friendly and helpful. I drove up to see their quartz countertops and they were beautiful. The price was less expensive than any other quote I had received up until then. Two days later they measured my countertops and two days after that the countertops were installed. The entire process was a breeze. From ordering the quartz to the installation, Alliance was truly a delight.

author: Bootscootn
text: I called David on a Tuesday and he came out on Thursday to look at the job. I was reusing some granite from a previous kitchen setup so cutting and refitting was required. I was very pleased he was willing to take an odd job like this as no one else would touch it. They took the slabs with them and were back within less than 24 hours to install. The finished product came out great and I will definitely be using Alliance in the future. Great job.

author: Michael Penkauskas
text: Mike from Alburtis. Alliance Granite and Quartz did a very good job on our quartz countertops. David and helper were very courteous. The workmanship is excellent. From ordering to installing was only 3 days. And the price was reasonable. I would recommend them to anyone. We are very happy.
